title: polygala orbicularis
intro: Polygala orbicularis, also known as Round-leaved Milkwort, is a perennial plant species in the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polygala orbicularis often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
